description: You are an executive assistant at Sterling Dynamics Group. A 4-person executive delegation is attending Hannover Messe 2025 in Germany. Create a professional travel briefing document in Apache OpenOffice Writer using the details (flight itineraries, hotel booking, meeting schedule, emergency contacts, and delegation roster) provided in '/home/ga/Documents/delegation_data.json'. Save the document as '/home/ga/Documents/Sterling_Hannover_Messe_Briefing_2025.odt'. The document must feature a title, an auto-generated Table of Contents at the beginning, and page numbers in the footer. Organize the content using 'Heading 1' for sections (Trip Overview, Delegation Roster, Travel Itinerary, Hotel Accommodations, Meeting Schedule, Venue & Logistics, and Emergency Contacts) and 'Heading 2' for subsections. Include formatted tables for the Delegation Roster, Flight Itinerary, Meeting Schedule, and Emergency Contacts.
